rule_1_high_press_winning.name: High Press When Winning
rule_1_high_press_winning.description: Maintain high pressing intensity when winning to control the game
rule_1_high_press_winning.rationale: Winning position - press to prevent comeback

rule_2_midfield_press.name: Increase Pressing in Midfield
rule_2_midfield_press.description: Increase pressing intensity in midfield when losing possession there frequently

rule_3_counter_press.name: Immediate Counter-Press After Loss
rule_3_counter_press.description: Immediate pressing after losing possession to regain it quickly
rule_3_counter_press.rationale: Best time to regain possession is immediately after loss

rule_4_defensive_press.name: Lower Press When Trailing Late
rule_4_defensive_press.description: Lower pressing intensity and drop defensive line when trailing late
rule_4_defensive_press.action: Lower pressing intensity - defend deep and counter

rule_5_balanced_press.name: Balanced Pressing in Tight Matches
rule_5_balanced_press.description: Maintain balanced pressing in tied or close matches
